# FDSH Code of Conduct

We want FDSH to be friendly and safe for everyone. Basically: **don’t be an idiot**.

- Be respectful to others.
- No harassment, hate speech, or trolling.
- Keep discussions and contributions civil.

If someone violates these rules, report it by opening an issue or contacting the repo maintainers.  
This Code of Conduct applies to all contributors and participants in the FDSH project.
